zh.Roskilde Domkirche, Roskilde, Kobenhaven: 丹麥洛斯吉爾德洛斯吉爾德
zh.København, Kobenhavn, Denmark: 丹麥奧本哈福哥本哈根
zh.lifeSummary: 當KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark於1216年出生在丹麥時，他的父親Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen46歲，母親Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark24歲。他於1239年與Jutta of Saxony在丹麥結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1232年在丹麥被列為king of denmark。他去世於1250年8月10日在Baltic Sea享年34歲，埋葬在丹麥林斯泰德。

zh-hans.Roskilde Domkirche, Roskilde, Kobenhaven: 丹麦洛斯吉爾德洛斯吉爾德
zh-hans.København, Kobenhavn, Denmark: 丹麦奧本哈福哥本哈根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark于1216年出生在丹麦时，他的父亲Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen46岁，母亲Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark24岁。他于1239年与Jutta of Saxony在丹麦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1232年在丹麦被列为king of denmark。他去世于1250年8月10日在Baltic Sea享年34岁，埋葬在丹麦林斯泰德。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Denmark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): ethnic name denoting someone from Denmark (see   Dence  ). In the British Isles this name is found mainly in East Anglia.
Americanized form of German Dennemark, ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle Low German Dennemarken.

variants.name: Dence
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Herta.

English (Kent): variant of Dench, an ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle English denshe, dench ‘Danish’ (Old English denisc). There were many Danes in England in the Middle Ages, not only the long-established settlers in the Danelaw region, but also more recent immigrants.

nameMeanings.name: Erik
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Later variant of   Eirik  , now in frequent use, especially in Sweden.

variants.name: Eric
meanings: Of Old Norse origin, from ei ‘ever, always’ (or einn ‘one, alone’) + ríkr ‘ruler’ ( see Eirik ). It was introduced into Britain by Scandinavian settlers before the Norman Conquest. As a modern given name, it was revived in the mid 19th century and has remained in use since.

variants.name: Eirik
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Eirikr, a compound of ei ‘ever, always’ (or einn ‘one, alone’) + ríkr ‘ruler’.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark was born in 1216, in Denmark, his father, Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen, was 46 and his mother, Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, was 24. He married Jutta of Saxony in 1239, in Denmark. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. In 1232, his occupation is listed as king of denmark in Denmark. He died on 10 August 1250, in Baltic Sea, at the age of 34, and was buried in Ringsted, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark est né en 1216, à Danemark, son père, Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Jutta of Saxony en 1239, à Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. En 1232, sa profession de son indiquée est king of denmark à Danemark. Il est décédé le 10 août 1250, à Baltic Sea, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Ringsted, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark 1216 in Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen 46 und seine Mutter Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark 24. Er hat 1239 in Dänemark Jutta of Saxony geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1232 ist sein Beruf als king of denmark in Dänemark aufgeführt. Er starb am 10. August 1250 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Baltic Sea und wurde in Ringsted, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark è nato il nel 1216 nel Danimarca, il suo padre, Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Jutta of Saxony nel 1239, nel Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1232, la sua occupazione è indicata come king of denmark nel Danimarca. Morì il 10 agosto 1250, nel Baltic Sea, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Ringsted, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmarkが1216年にデンマークで生まれた時，父Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsenは46歳，母Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmarkは24歳であった。1239年にデンマークでJutta of Saxonyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1232年，デンマークでの職業はking of denmarkと記録されている。彼は1250年8月10日にBaltic Seaで34歳で死去し，デンマークリングステドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark(이)가 1216년 덴마크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1239년 덴마크에서 Jutta of Saxony(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1232년, 그의 직업은 덴마크에서 king of denmark이었다. 그는 1250년 8월 10일 Baltic Sea에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 링스테드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark nasceu em 1216, em Dinamarca, seu pai, Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Jutta of Saxony em 1239, em Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1232, sua profissão aparece como king of denmark em Dinamarca. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1250, em Baltic Sea, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Ringsted, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark родился в 1216 г. в местности Дания, его отцу по имени Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Jutta of Saxony в 1239 г. в местности Дания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. В 1232 году он работал по профессии king of denmark в местности Дания. Он умер 10 августа 1250 г. в местности Baltic Sea в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности рингстед, Дания.

sm.from 1232 to 1250: mai le 1232 e o'o I le 1250

es.lifeSummary: Cuando KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark nació en 1216, en Dinamarca, su papá, Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Jutta of Saxony en 1239, en Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1232, su ocupación registrada era king of denmark en Dinamarca. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1250, en Baltic Sea, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Ringsted, Dinamarca.
